flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Southwestern Illinois College fell 23% between 2006 and 2009 (26.7% → 20.5%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Southwestern Illinois College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.9k → $6.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Southwestern Illinois College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.4% → 0.0%).
